recommendations.title: Paper Moon
recommendations.overview: During the Great Depression, a con man finds himself saddled with a young girl who may or may not be his daughter, and the two forge an unlikely partnership.

recommendations.title: The Thing Called Love
recommendations.overview: A group of newcomers to the country music business seek love and stardom.

recommendations.title: What's Up, Doc?
recommendations.overview: The accidental mix-up of four identical plaid overnight bags leads to a series of increasingly wild and wacky situations.

recommendations.title: Mask
recommendations.overview: A significantly deformed but highly intelligent teenage boy and his biker gang mother attempt to live as normal a life as possible under the circumstances.

recommendations.title: Targets
recommendations.overview: An aging horror-movie icon's fate intersects with that of a seemingly ordinary young man on a psychotic shooting spree around Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: She's Funny That Way
recommendations.overview: On the set of a playwright's new project, a love triangle forms between his wife, her ex-lover, and the call girl-turned-actress cast in the production.

recommendations.title: The Cat's Meow
recommendations.overview: Semi-true story of the Hollywood murder that occurred at a star-studded gathering aboard William Randolph Hearst's yacht in 1924.

recommendations.title: The Last Picture Show
recommendations.overview: High school seniors and best friends, Sonny and Duane, live in a dying Texas town. The handsome Duane is dating a local beauty, while Sonny is having an affair with the coach's wife. As graduation nears and both boys contemplate their futures, Duane

recommendations.title: Marriage Story
recommendations.overview: A stage director and an actress struggle through a grueling, coast-to-coast divorce that pushes them to their personal extremes.

recommendations.title: All About Eve
recommendations.overview: From the moment she glimpses her idol at the stage door, Eve Harrington is determined to take the reins of power away from the great actress Margo Channing. Eve maneuvers her way into Margo's Broadway role, becomes a sensation and even causes turmoil
